message:
fix: bd doctor detects stale .legacy hook sidecars calling removed bd hook (GH#2398)

Python pre-commit framework creates .legacy sidecar files from previous
hooks. Old beads hooks used bd hook which was removed in v0.58.0.
Doctor now checks for these stale sidecars and warns with a fix suggestion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
